description: Phishing templates impersonating entertainment and consumer reward services

templates.name: Spotify Account Issue
suggested_subject_lines: Spotify: We couldn't charge your payment method
Your Spotify Premium subscription is about to expire
Spotify: Action required to keep your account
templates.notes: Consumer-brand lure that works on personal-device and BYOD users; the failed-payment angle drives quick action. Best for general awareness rather than role-specific testing — many recipients will note it's a personal account in a work inbox.

templates.name: Starbucks Gift Card Offer
suggested_subject_lines: You have a Starbucks reward waiting — claim it now
Your Starbucks Stars are expiring soon
Congratulations! You have a $10 Starbucks reward
templates.notes: Reward-based lure with strong cross-role appeal — the 'free reward' hook draws clicks even from cautious users. Effective as an early-program baseline to demonstrate susceptibility to too-good-to-be-true offers.
